mapper.sql: id, task_id, shop_id, platform, status, started_at, finished_at, row_count, error_message, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE task_run SET shop_id = #{shopId}, platform = #{platform}, status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, row_count = #{rowCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS running_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN row_count ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_row_count, MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN finished_at ELSE NULL END) AS latest_success_finished_at FROM task_run WHERE shop_id = #{shopId}
